_note: EXAMPLE / format reference for session_taxonomy.json (which is git-ignored because it holds machine-specific 'local_<uuid>' session ids). Copy this to session_taxonomy.json and fill the 'sessions' map. Maps a Claude Code session id -> '<Subsystem>/<Module>' taxonomy prefix (v2 convention). Vocabulary is from Quality/modules-features-matrix/modules.json (issue #19). Value null = no taxonomy prefix. Sessions absent from the map get only the '#PR<N> - ' / '[no PR] - ' core. rename_sessions_by_pr.py validates the module against the matrix vocab (+ provisional gaps) and warns on typos.

_provisional_gaps.Mobile/Map: modules.json has no Mobile 'Map' module but the mobile map exists (MOB-03/#28).
_provisional_gaps.Service/API: connections-api backend has no module in the matrix yet.

_rules: Multi-module session -> pick the primary module.
